case_title: KEN H YEE VS. BIANCA MARCONCINI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-03-2024 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF FEB-09-2024 IS AFFIRMED WITH A MODIFIED AMOUNT. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG, CLERK: K. SEPTIEN, NOT REPORTED, (504).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF KEN H. YEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIANCA MARCONCINI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ken Yee Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per
Bianca Marconcini Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per.

All parties are sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent Ken Yee testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Yee shares the following exhibits:

Exh 1: New Invoice for rent and additional costs.
(The Court is not inclined to consider some new costs)

Exh 2: Rental and Deposit Agreement

Defendant/Appellant Bianca Marconcini testifies on her own behalf.
Ms. Marconcini shares the following exhibits:

Exh A: Zelle Payment records

The Court asks clarifying questions.

All exhibits are returned to the offering parties.

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

Bianca Marconcini Defendant/Appellant must pay Ken Yee Plaintiff/Respondent 150.00.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
